Steel Breast Plate
wt 24, size: Tiny

I'll just pop this in my wrist pouch then!

8 posts

▲ Page top
Definate monk item
QuoteReply
# Jul 22 2001 at 10:18 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592248467600
10 posts
WHy cant monks use this??
▲ Page top
RE: Definate monk item
QuoteReply
# Apr 25 2002 at 11:31 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592252472256
72 posts
monks cant use armour that reduces there movement- as thit would inhibit their combat moves- so monk armour has to be flexible and light, and flow with the forms of the combat techniques

beter idead would be for classes to wear wahat they like, but incur penalties to skills :)

ie wizard in plate would have -100 to casting skills etc

think this idea is nicked from RQ or Harn

STOP! > thief!
▲ Page top
RE: Definate monk item
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2002 at 1:22 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592250526024
71 posts
way to spot a joke there buddy
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 23 2001 at 5:32 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) hmmmmmm sure, with 24,5 weight ? lol
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 04 2001 at 11:25 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) uh it was a joke to begin with.
Yes But
QuoteReply
# Jul 19 2001 at 9:50 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249677247
Scholar
30 posts
Yes its Heavy, Yes it's got no Stats or Resistances but I would still trade it anyday for
my black Enameled BP. At 48th level Warr I don't have a Treeweave even yet. So this would have to do in my case. Of course if you've got better it's no big deal....

# Jul 18 2001 at 8:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757647090
Scholar
19 posts
Barbed Ringmail Tunic..AC 30 +9 Str, +50 hp..chain and plate classes..4.0 wt. Same zone and droppable as well. Excellent Rogue and Ranger BP, basically Stonewood Mail but far more useful.

what
QuoteReply
# Jul 18 2001 at 1:22 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
LOL im a level 50 warrior, using bloodpoint and frostbringer, have idol of thorned etc etc but i still use a treeweave cuz the armor never drops for thurg quest and there simply isnt anything for sale thats better. i have the str to blow on 24 weight no big deal and i would use it....
▲ Page top
Twinking?
QuoteReply
# Jul 17 2001 at 6:38 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361376436
11 posts
Well, this could be used as a twinking bp. I guess... REALLY heavy, but hey...Other things are heavy.

Could also be for a quest as Cuclain suggested. I would hope so. Maybe it'll get a size reduction in further patches or something.
▲ Page top
Not very useful
QuoteReply
# Jul 17 2001 at 6:23 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757294417
16 posts
A 30ac chest with no stats, no resists and no effect that weighs 24.4 and is attainable at 50+? Unless this turns out to be a quest item, I bet they get sold to merchants.
▲ Page top
RE: Not very useful
QuoteReply
# Jul 17 2001 at 8:00 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
You must be a newbie or very ignorant if you think 30ac with no stats is useless, this is a great upgrade to treeweave which some level 50+ people still use because they havnt gotten anything better. 30ac is decent for a BP and stats dont do much compared to ac, AC is king, resists are also useful.
▲ Page top
RE: Not very useful
QuoteReply
# Jul 17 2001 at 11:46 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592756999176
61 posts
*cough* mainly only non-plate class would be wearing one at that level. *cough* They can't wear this it being plate and all. This is a good item for twinking or selling to merchant (if not for a quest). Ac might be king for AC tanks, and by 50+ they should have a brestplate with about 30 or more ac with stats and resists. For the rest ac is great to have but not neccesary, i am not saying they walking around with no ac, they should have some, but they shouldn't wear something just for the ac, if i was a non-plate wearing class I would gladly chose 25 ac 10str over 30 ac and a lot of weight.
▲ Page top
RE: Not very useful
QuoteReply
# Jul 18 2001 at 3:27 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591755329377
6 posts
Well Actually, I know a lot of people playing plate classes that are still wearing treeweaves or similar into the mid 50's. having better than 30AC means you've either been lucky on a planes raid at some point, are in a guild that can Kill Trakanon or the Royalty in Chardok regularly. Oh yes and if you cant do that then you can forget about being able to do the Velious armour quests.
▲ Page top
RE: Not very useful
